data.body:
A plus: Yay for bringing Lee Pace back as Thrandy!

But man… some of those OC names are making my eye twitch.

“Halvard”?? Either commit to the canonical Halbarad or pick something else?? Cos the proximity to Halbrand is like… y’all really want to be that close???
data.author: did:plc:upvw2efsfxszfsmmkkmj7pn2

data.body:
And yes this is a massive nitpick on my end, but Halflings traditionally name their girl-babies after flowers or jewels.

“Marigol” feels like they’ve mangled the flower name just so they could get a -gol suffix cos how else will we know she’s related to Smeagol, I guess?? It feels forced.
data.author: did:plc:upvw2efsfxszfsmmkkmj7pn2

data.body:
There is a Marigold in TROP - mum of Elanor (Nori).

Who is not to be confused with 3rd + 4th Age Elanor who is daughter of Sam and Rosie - who is also said to have a main role in this film. 

This is on par with using Héra for WOTR to differentiate from the Greek goddess Hera.

I’m going to bed now
data.author: did:plc:upvw2efsfxszfsmmkkmj7pn2

data.body:
By my reading, if the VP & cabinet/other body fail to reaffirm w/in four days. If they reaffirm, then Congress has 21 days to sustain it by 2/3 supermajorities.

So, it looks to me like it immediately ousts him for at least four days, irrevocably, but anything beyond that requires further action.
